_comment: Accepted false positives for Weaver-Free GitHub code scanning alerts. Auditor: scripts/audit-code-scanning.ts. Add entries only for confirmed false positives — not for accepted risks. Accepted risks must be tracked in business/legal/SECURITY-AUDIT.md instead.

dismissed.reason: CodeQL does not parse TypeScript 5.x cast syntax (as unknown as {...} on line 139). File typechecks clean with vue-tsc. Not a real syntax error.

HTTP response is (1) size-bounded at MAX_REMOTE_CATALOG_BYTES, (2) Zod-schema-validated before any write, and (3) written to a config-controlled path, not a user-supplied one. CodeQL taint analysis cannot reason through schema.parse() so this fires as a false positive.

The cache read already uses the readFile-with-ENOENT-fallthrough pattern that CodeQL's rule prescribes. The slug is validated against the COMPLIANCE_DOCS whitelist before any path construction. CodeQL cannot reason through the whitelist check so this fires as a false positive.
